## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm format:check` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test:run` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] New code has unit tests where applicable
- [ ] Public exports have JSDoc comments
- [ ] No new dependencies introduced (or justified in PR description)

## Checklist

- [ ] Title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] Description explains *why*, not just *what*
- [ ] No `console.log` / `debugger` / commented-out code left behind
- [ ] Backwards-compatible (or breaking change called out below)
